affected_files.description: File paths that will be read, written, or deleted

estimated_impact.description: Estimated impact level of the operation

tool_name.description: Name of the tool requesting approval

tool_purpose.description: Human-readable description of what the tool will do

ExecutionContext.title: ExecutionContext

GateDecision.description: Result of a blocking gate request
GateDecision.title: GateDecision

Agent.description: A registered agent in the APM system
Agent.title: Agent

AgentContext.description: Real-time AG-UI context for an agent (v8.4.0)
AgentContext.title: AgentContext

ApprovalAuditEntry.description: Audit log entry for an approval decision (v9.0.0)
ApprovalAuditEntry.title: ApprovalAuditEntry

Observation.description: A claude-mem observation from the ObservationCache or claude-mem worker
Observation.title: Observation

ApprovalGate.description: Approval gate for a tool invocation (v9.0.0)
ApprovalGate.title: ApprovalGate

display_name.description: Human-readable scoped label for the requesting agent (e.g. ccem/wave-1/stripe-env). Null if context unavailable.

info.description:
CCEM Agent Performance & Management — real-time monitoring, AgentLock
authorization, Plugin Engine, and formation orchestration.

All routes annotated with open_api_spex ControllerSpecs (api-s7 Wave 2b / CP-288).
build_spec/0 deleted. This module is the single source of truth for the
OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec served at GET /api/v2/openapi.json.
info.title: CCEM APM API

get.description: Returns all unresolved human-input requests waiting for a response.

post.description:
Main AgentLock authorization gate. Evaluates the tool call against policy rules,
session trust level, and risk thresholds. Returns allow/deny/ask decision.

get.description: Returns a single approval gate by ID.

post.description: Registers a new agent or upserts an existing one.

get.description: Returns the current UPM execution state from UpmStore.

post.description: Assigns a port to a service/agent.
Pushes a status update to the configured Plane workspace.

get.description: Returns all PM integrations, optionally filtered by project.

post.description: Creates or upserts a PM integration.

get.description: Returns the current scanner run status.
Returns all agents belonging to a formation.

post.description: Replaces all fields of a registered agent (v3 compatibility alias).
Reloads apm_config.json from disk and propagates changes.

get.description: Returns all VCS integrations, optionally filtered by project.

post.description: Creates or upserts a VCS integration.

get.description: Returns all showcase-eligible projects from the APM config.

post.description: Registers a new UPM execution session and broadcasts via PubSub.
Sends a lifecycle control action to an individual agent (connect, disconnect, restart, stop, pause, resume).

get.description: Lists all registered agents. Optional `project` filter.
Returns all work items, optionally filtered by project.

delete.description: Removes a UPM project by ID.

get.description: Returns a single UPM project by ID.
Returns all registered agents with cursor-based pagination.

post.description: Terminates the running session for the named environment.

get.description: Returns detail for a single skill by name.
Returns showcase data for a specific project.
Returns all registered background tasks.

post.description: Registers a new background task and starts tracking it.
Terminates a running background task.

get.description: Returns details for a single named environment.
Returns the most recent 10 sync results and total sync count.
Returns the full OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec for the CCEM APM API. Served by ApmV5Web.ApiSpec (open_api_spex SSOT). build_spec/0 deleted in api-s7 Wave 2b (CP-288).
Returns all registered remote skill repositories (mcpmarket/skillfish).

post.description: Registers a new remote skill repository.

get.description: Detects drift between UPM stories and PM system work items.

post.description: Creates a UPM session by parsing a design handoff README for implementation order.

readme_content.description: Raw README.md string from design handoff package

post.summary: Create UPM session from design handoff

get.description: Returns all registered ports and their assignments.
Returns a list of port conflicts across registered services.
Returns all tracked skills from SkillTracker.
Returns recent agent activity log entries. Optional `agent_id` and `limit` filters.

post.description: Records a Claude model usage event (tokens, tool_calls) for a project.

get.description: Returns all items in the intake queue.

post.description: Submits a new work item to the UPM intake queue.
Reports a UPM lifecycle event for an agent in a session.

delete.description: Removes a VCS integration by ID.

get.description: Returns a single VCS integration by ID.
Returns all approval gates, optionally filtered by status.

parameters.description: Filter by status (pending | approved | rejected | timeout)
parameters.name: status

post.description: Reloads apm_config.json from disk and propagates changes.

get.description: Returns a single notification by ID with full refs, trace, metadata, and actions.

post.description: Creates a new approval gate for a tool invocation. Notifies connected dashboards via PubSub.

get.description: Returns log output for a background task.
Returns 200 when StatusCache is warm and critical GenServers are alive. Returns 503 with failed check names otherwise.

post.description: Scans configured project directories for changes.

get.description: Returns all registered UPM projects.

post.description: Creates or upserts a UPM project.
Persists a Claude Code session to disk and notifies SessionManager.
Runs SyncEngine.sync_project/1 for every registered project.
Deploys the latest hook scripts to all configured project directories.

get.description: Returns all registered slash commands for the active project.

post.description: Registers or replaces the slash command set for a project.
Triggers a sync of a remote skill repository.

get.description: Returns all active and historical Claude Code sessions with cursor-based pagination.
Returns a single agent with computed health score and recent metrics.
Returns model capability limits with optional utilization data if `project` is specified.
Returns recent messages in the agent's chat channel.

post.description: Posts a message to the agent's chat channel and broadcasts via PubSub.
Resolves a pending human-input request with the provided response.

get.description: Returns the result of a single action execution by ID.

Returns A2UI declarative component specifications per the Google A2UI protocol.
Supports content negotiation via Accept header:
- `application/jsonl` (default): JSONL stream, one JSON object per line
- `application/json`: single JSON array response

post.description: Registers an agent with work-item binding in a UPM session.
Starts a long-running session in the named environment.
Synchronizes tasks from an external source (e.g. Plane) into ProjectStore.

get.description: Returns aggregated totals, model breakdown, and per-project effort levels.

post.description: Imports a previously exported APM snapshot.
Tests the connection for a VCS integration.

get.description: Returns 200 when the BEAM is up and Phoenix is responding. Minimal body.

post.description: Designates a port as the primary port for a service.

delete.description: Removes a registered remote skill repository by ID.
Removes a skill from the permissive list by name.

get.description: Returns history of all action executions.
Returns aggregated health and performance metrics across all agents.
Returns full server status including agent counts, project, and version.

Returns RFC 8615 / IETF draft-inadarei-api-health-check-06 compliant health
status with extended BEAM VM and ETS checks. Response uses `pass/warn/fail`
vocabulary (not `ok`). Also served at GET `/.well-known/health`.

post.description: Updates the last_heartbeat timestamp for an agent.
Triggers a live port scan and updates the port registry.

get.description: Returns all CCEM-managed environments.
Returns raw telemetry metrics from the BEAM VM.
Returns all formations from UpmStore.

post.description: Creates a new formation from a template or raw params. Broadcasts via PubSub.
Sets read=true on all existing notifications.

get.description:
Server-Sent Events endpoint streaming AG-UI protocol events.

Sends an initial STATE_SNAPSHOT event with current agents/sessions/notifications,
then forwards subsequent AG-UI events. Optional `agent_id` query param filters
events to a specific agent. Connection stays open until client disconnects;
keepalive comments are sent every 30 seconds.
Returns the permissive skill list (bypasses AgentLock for named skills).

post.description: Adds a skill to the permissive list.

get.description: Returns a breakdown of the health score for a skill.

post.description: Marks an approval gate as approved. Broadcasts decision via PubSub.

get.description: Returns 200 when the OTP supervision tree is fully initialized. Returns 503 while starting up.

post.description: Persists a formation manifest to the :upm_manifests ETS table.

get.description: Returns all configured projects from the APM config.

patch.description: Updates the active project name in the APM config.

post.description: Posts a notification to the APM notification bus.

get.description: Returns the most recent scan results.
Returns a single background task by ID.

patch.description: Updates status or metadata for a background task.

get.description: Returns a Graphviz DOT source string for the formation's agent graph.
Runs AgentDiscovery.discover_now/0 and returns discovered agents.

post.description: POST alias for notify — adds a notification to the bus.

get.description: Returns agents, edges, tasks, notifications, ralph data, commands, and input requests for the active project.

post.description: Scans project directories and syncs discovered projects.

get.description: Returns recent notifications with optional category/project/namespace/type filters.

post.description: Runs SyncEngine.sync_project/1 for a single project.

get.description:
Renders all registered CCEM APM metrics in Prometheus text exposition format
(`text/plain; version=0.0.4`). Returns `503` if the peep reporter is unavailable.

This endpoint is intentionally outside the `:api` pipeline — restrict at the
load-balancer or firewall in production.

post.description: Runs a shell command in the named environment.

delete.description: Resets all usage counters for a project.

get.description: Returns usage data and effort level for a single project.
Returns all actions registered in the ActionEngine catalog.

post.description: Terminates a running background task.
Creates a new human-input request and broadcasts it via PubSub.
Tests the connection for a PM integration.

get.description: Returns all registered background tasks.

post.description: Registers a new background task and starts tracking it.
Updates tracking fields (todo_ref, commit_sha, worktree_ref, etc.) for a story.

get.description: Returns all Claude model/token usage data keyed by project then model.
Exports the full APM data set as a JSON snapshot.
Returns all permanent allow/deny/escalate policy rules for tool authorization.

post.description: Marks an approval gate as rejected with an optional reason.

get.description: Returns the full OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec for the CCEM APM API. Served by ApmV5Web.ApiSpec (open_api_spex SSOT). build_spec/0 deleted in api-s7 Wave 2b (CP-288).

post.description: Reloads showcase data for a project from disk and broadcasts via PubSub.

get.description: Returns log output for a background task.
Returns D3.js-compatible flowchart nodes and edges for the active Ralph session.
Returns a single background task by ID.

patch.description: Updates status or metadata for a background task.

get.description: Returns all registered intake watchers.

post.description: Triggers a full rescan of all skills and broadcasts an audit event.

get.description: Returns all skills with health scores and aggregate counts.
Returns the current Ralph methodology data (stories, flowchart nodes) for a project.

post.description: Records a skill invocation event in SkillTracker.
Registers a new agent or upserts an existing one.
Executes a named action from the ActionEngine catalog.

get.description: Returns a single formation by ID with its agents.

patch.description: Updates a formation's attributes. Validates state transitions via FormationStateMachine.

get.description:
Returns RFC 8615 / IETF draft-inadarei-api-health-check-06 compliant health
status with extended BEAM VM and ETS checks. Response uses `pass/warn/fail`
vocabulary (not `ok`). Also served at GET `/.well-known/health`.

delete.description: Removes a PM integration by ID.

get.description: Returns a single PM integration by ID.
